meanings.definition: a period of three months; especially one of the three three-month periods into which human pregnancy is divided
one of three divisions of an academic year

examples: the spare figure of a marathon runner
a body kept trim by exercise

meanings.definition: of places; characterized by order and neatness; free from disorder

examples: a clean-cut and well-bred young man
the trig corporal in his jaunty cap

meanings.definition: severely simple in line or design
